_comment: Example: Striker St. Elmo's DPS — fully ID-referenced build
shortSummary: Striker 4pc with St. Elmo's Engine. Hit the 200-stack cap for +200% weapon damage. Highest sustained DPS in Y7S3 meta.
description: Striker's Gamble stacks +1% weapon damage per hit (Risk Management backpack) up to 200 stacks with Press the Advantage chest. St. Elmo's shock rounds from Actum Est stun groups. Coyote's Mask provides group-wide crit buff. Goal: reach 60% Crit Chance cap, then stack Crit Damage.
author: Kamikazevondoom

mask.notes: Hit 4 different enemies for group-wide +10% CHC for 10s. Fire into groups as your opener.

chest.notes: Press the Advantage extends stack cap to 200. Mandatory — do not swap this talent.

backpack.notes: Risk Management scales each stack from 0.65% to 1%. At 200 stacks = +200% weapon damage total.

holster.notes: Grupo Sombra 2pc with Kneepads gives +10% Weapon Damage brand bonus.

primary.attribute3: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
primary.mods: Magazine: Extra Rounds | Muzzle: Crit Hit Damage | Optic: Crit Hit Damage
setupSteps: Reconfigure 3rd attribute to DMG to Targets Out of Cover at the Crafting Station.
Set all mod slots to Critical Hit Damage.
Max out Core1 (AR Damage) via Tinkering — this is your primary damage stat.

drops.source: Targeted Loot: Assault Rifles in Countdown (Heroic)
drops.note: Set AR as your targeted loot type before launching.

drops.source: Exotic Cache from Season Pass reward track
drops.note: Fastest guaranteed route if you have Season Pass.

primary.notes: Shock from Actum Est stuns groups every 100 hits — use it to reset rooms in Legendary.

secondary.mods: Magazine: Extra Rounds | Muzzle: Crit Hit Damage
setupSteps: Roll Frenzy talent via Recalibration or Tinkering.
Roll Crit Hit Damage as 3rd attribute — LMG Core2 is already DMG Out of Cover (locked), no need to add it.
Reload from empty before entering rooms to proc Frenzy (+25% fire rate and damage for 10s).

drops.source: World drop: LMGs at Heroic difficulty
drops.note: Any Heroic mission with LMG targeted loot.

secondary.notes: LMG Core2 is always DMG Out of Cover on every LMG — do not waste a recalibration trying to roll it.

skill1.notes: Set on your primary target. Adds hits toward Striker stacks without you spending ammo.

skill2.notes: Place before every elite fight, not during. Your solo safety net.

howToPlay: Pre-stack Striker stacks on approach enemies before entering a new room — never walk into a boss fight at zero stacks. Fire continuously — every break resets stack building. Use Coyote's Mask opener by firing into groups of 4+ enemies first. Drone handles your primary elite, you clean up the rest. Reload when safe, not under fire — Frenzy on the LMG requires a full magazine for maximum effect.
strengths: Highest sustained DPS in Y7S3 meta at full 200 stacks
Shock from St. Elmo's provides free CC every 100 hits
Works solo and in group — stacks in solo, stacks multiply in group
Coyote's Mask buffs the entire team
weaknesses: Requires 3 exotic items — Coyote's Mask, St. Elmo's Engine, and Memento if substituted
Stacks reset on death — losing stacks in Legendary requires rebuilding
Full potential requires 200 stacks, takes ~4-5 seconds of continuous fire to reach
substitutions: No Coyote's Mask? Use Vile Mask — slightly less damage but adds status effect synergy.
No Kingbreaker? Any named AR with Flatline talent works, just at 15% instead of 25%.
No St. Elmo's? Use Lexington Event Horizon (named AR) with Perfectly Unhinged — different playstyle, lower ceiling.
tips: Pre-stack on approach enemies — enter every room at 100+ stacks minimum
60% Crit Chance cap first, then stack Crit Damage
Drone handles the elite, you clean trash — let drone sustain your stacks
Reviver Hive: place before the fight, not reactively

shortSummary: Status spread build for Legendary rooms and group control. Scorpio seeds statuses, Vile punishes every tick, Eclipse turns one target into a room-wide problem.
description: Open with Scorpio to apply layered status effects, then let Eclipse Protocol spread them through clustered enemies. Vile adds passive damage over time while your skills keep rooms locked down.
author: DIV2BUILDS AI

mask.notes: The mask is the damage engine. Keep statuses rolling at all times.

chest.notes: Spread is what makes the build absurd in cramped rooms.

backpack.notes: Status applications buff ally damage windows.

setupSteps: Use Scorpio to seed the first status in each room.
Prioritize elites and rushers to spread control quickly.

drops.note: Countdown or Heroic targeted loot are the simplest routes.

primary.notes: One shot starts the status chain.

secondary.attribute3: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
secondary.mods: Optic: Crit Hit Chance | Muzzle: Crit Hit Damage
setupSteps: Use only when enemies are already controlled.
This slot is a fallback, not the identity of the build.

skill1.notes: Place on cover-heavy enemies or spawn doors.

skill2.notes: Good room opener to start the first chain.

howToPlay: Do not tunnel on weapon DPS. Your job is room control. Seed one target with Scorpio, layer a skill status, then reposition and repeat before spreads expire.
strengths: Excellent crowd control for Legendary groups
Strong passive damage from Vile on top of control
weaknesses: Feels weak if enemies are spread out
Solo pace is slower than straight DPS
Requires deliberate targeting and cooldown timing
substitutions: No Vile Mask? Replace with a high-end status mask and expect lower passive damage.
No Scorpio? Any reliable status enabler works, but room control gets worse.
tips: Start fights with statuses, not bullets.
Target the enemy that stands closest to the rest.
Your value is uptime, not kill count.

shortSummary: Safe solo hybrid for Heroic farming. Kingbreaker handles pressure, deployed skills hold lanes, Memento smooths survivability and tempo.
description: Refactor rewards you for fighting near deployed skills, so this build leans into turret and drone uptime while Memento gives armor, weapon damage and steady momentum in solo play.
author: DIV2BUILDS AI

chest.notes: Keep both skills active to squeeze value out of the chest.

backpack.notes: The backpack carries survivability and long-fight tempo.

kneepads.notes: One-piece Wyvern is easy value for hybrid output.

primary.attribute3: DMG to Targets Out of Cover
primary.mods: Optic: Crit Hit Chance | Muzzle: Crit Hit Damage
setupSteps: Stay close to your deployed skills.
Use Kingbreaker to finish enemies your skills are already softening.

drops.note: Countdown is the least annoying way to target farm it.

primary.notes: Very stable main weapon for a safe farming loop.

secondary.mods: Magazine: Extra Rounds | Muzzle: Crit Hit Damage
setupSteps: Swap when you need a safer lane-hold tool.

drops.note: Heroic targeted loot or exotic cache.

secondary.notes: Alternate weapon for steadier lane control.

skill1.notes: Anchor your fight space with it.

skill2.notes: Use it to chase the enemy you are not currently shooting.

howToPlay: Drop turret before you peak, launch drone on the farthest target, then play the middle distance. The build is strongest when you let your skills create pressure while you clean up exposed enemies.
strengths: Much safer than full glass DPS
Good bridge build if you do not want pure skill or pure weapon play
substitutions: No Memento? Use Hana-U backpack with In-Sync for a more skill-leaning version.
No Iron Lung? Any controllable LMG works as a fallback lane-hold weapon.
tips: Fight around your turret instead of constantly pushing.
Great build for getting comfortable with Heroic loops.
